content.summary: Full Phong material with normal mapping, specular map, and diffuse texture. The vertex shader builds a TBN (Tangent-Bitangent-Normal) matrix for correct tangent-space normal mapping. Supports fog, OIT transparency, and emissive glow. Uses TDLighting for all scene lights.
warnings: Geometry must have tangent attributes; add an Attribute SOP set to Tangents if missing
Connect at least one Light COMP to the Render TOP for TDLighting to produce output
If no normal map is available, connect a Constant TOP (0.5, 0.5, 1.0) to slot 1

uniforms.description: Multiplied on top of diffuse texture
uniforms.name: uDiffuseTint
